<?php namespace Faker\Provider\el_CY; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = ['gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'hotmail.com', 'cablenet.com.cy', 'cytanet.com.cy', 'primehome.com']; protected static $tld = ['com.cy', 'com.cy', 'com.cy', 'com.cy', 'com.cy', 'com.cy', 'biz', 'info', 'net', 'org']; }
